description: An aircraft is being rebranded with a new livery. An MRO facility must strip the old paint and apply the new one.

nodes.task_description: Apply chemical stripper to the aircraft to remove the old paint.

expected_outcome.value: Agent safely manages the paint stripping process.

nodes.task_description: Inspect the bare metal skin for any corrosion or damage that was hidden by the old paint.

expected_outcome.value: Agent performs an inspection and finds no hidden damage.

nodes.task_description: Apply the new livery according to the customer's engineering drawings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully paints the aircraft in the new colors and logos.
